dateRangeHelp: **Filters the export to a date range.** XPorter opens an X search tab and scrolls it to collect the posts — **keep that tab open until the export finishes.**
quantityLimitHelp: **How many posts (or users) to collect before the export stops.** Example: 500 stops at 500 posts. Choose **Unlimited** to grab everything X will give you.
requestCooldownHelp: **Pauses now and then so X won't block you for fetching too fast.** XPorter loads your data in batches of requests — go too quickly and X temporarily freezes the export. Default: **a 3-minute pause after every 20 requests**. A longer pause or smaller batch is safer but slower.
aboutDesc: Free & unlimited export of X (Twitter) data to CSV, JSON, or XLSX.
aboutNote: Your data never leaves your browser. This extension uses your active X session to fetch public data.
errNotLoggedIn: Please log in to x.com first
errStaleQuery: X API changed — retrying with fresh data...
errEndpointFailed: Could not connect to X API — make sure x.com is accessible
readyToExportDesc: Enter a Twitter username and click "Start Exporting" to begin collecting posts.
autoExpireHelp: **Auto-deletes saved export data after the set number of hours** to free space. Your past exports stay in the history list, but old ones **may no longer be downloadable.**
errInvalidDateRange: Date range is invalid — "From" must be earlier than "To"
errMaxRetries: Maximum retries exceeded — please try again later
ovNote: Keep this tab open. XPorter is scrolling it to collect posts.
contactLead: Bug reports, ideas, improvements, or collaboration — message me on Telegram. I read every message and reply.
contactEmailSub: I rarely check it, might miss your email
detailLocalBody: Everything runs inside your browser. There are no XPorter servers, no account, and no analytics or tracking. Your data goes straight from X into the file you download — it never passes through us.
detailSessionBody: XPorter reads the same public data you already see when you're logged in, using the X session that's already in your browser. It never asks for your password and never stores your login.
detailExportsBody: Posts, followers, following, and verified followers. Post exports include the full engagement metrics — views, likes, reposts, replies, quotes, and bookmarks — plus dates, links, media, and hashtags.
detailFormatsBody: Pick the format that fits your workflow: CSV for any spreadsheet, XLSX for Excel, or JSON for developers. Files are built locally and download straight to your device.
detailDatesBody: Export posts from a specific time window. Date-range exports open an X search tab and scroll it automatically to gather matching posts — just keep that tab open until it finishes.
detailResumeBody: Progress is saved as the export runs, so you can pause, close the popup, or even restart your browser and continue where you left off. XPorter also paces its requests to respect X's limits and avoid temporary blocks.
exportModeHelp:
What each export mode collects:
**📝 Posts** — all of the profile's posts (tweets, replies, reposts and quotes) with their full stats.
**👥 Followers** — the accounts that follow this profile.
**➡️ Following** — the accounts this profile follows.
**✓ Verified Followers** — only followers that have a verified (blue) checkmark.
